title: BaublesReforked
description: This mod adds rich modifier attributes to accessories.
body:
This mod adds rich modifier attributes to accessories.

Attributes are applied when you obtain the accessory. All attributes are randomized and can be reforged on an anvil by consuming materials and experience.

All attribute combinations can be customized in the config file, and reforge materials (along with other parameters) are fully configurable as well.
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31eabe4477ec3633d1b50ab8e77708c2dfc2f969.png)
